mohalla-tech.name: Mohalla Tech Pvt Ltd

meesho.name: Meesho
meesho.incorporation: India (reverse flip from Delaware completed May 2025)

shareholding.note: Foreign VCs hold majority: Elevation 14.49%, Peak XV 13.64%, Prosus 13.14%, SoftBank 9.91%, Fidelity 6.38%. Founders ~16.4%

incorporation.note: Now incorporated in India (Karnataka). Originally Delaware, completed reverse flip May 2025 via NCLT

boardControl.note: 8-member board, all Indian. Chairman/CEO Vidit Aatrey. 4 independent Indian directors. 2 Indian-origin investor nominees

founders.note: Both founders Indian (IIT Delhi). Vidit Aatrey active as CEO, Sanjeev Barnwal as CTO

dataSovereignty.note: Runs on Google Cloud Platform; GCP has India regions (Mumbai, Delhi) likely used. No public India-only data policy

revenueOrigin.note: 100% Indian market, INR 9,389 Cr revenue FY25, 1.83B orders

shareholding.note: Founders retain ~78.5% ownership. Foreign VCs (Accel, Insight Partners, Bond Capital) ~11%. ESOP ~10%

tata-digital.name: Tata Digital (BigBasket)
tata-digital.founders: Hari Menon, Vipul Parekh, VS Sudhakar, Abhinay Choudhari, VS Ramesh

shareholding.note: Tata Digital (100% Tata Sons) holds ~56% of BigBasket. Tata Sons ~66% Indian charitable trusts + ~18% Shapoorji Pallonji

incorporation.note: Tata Digital Ltd (Mumbai) and BigBasket (Supermarket Grocery Supplies Pvt Ltd) both incorporated in India

boardControl.note: Tata Group controls board. Sajith Sivanandan (Tata Digital CEO) chairs BigBasket board. All Indian directors

founders.note: All 5 founders Indian. Hari Menon (CEO), Vipul Parekh (CMO), Ramesh still active. 2 departed

hqAndTeam.note: HQ Bengaluru, all operations, warehouses, and engineering in India

dataSovereignty.note: Tata Group infrastructure in India plus cloud providers for scale

revenueOrigin.note: 100% Indian market — online grocery delivery serving Indian cities only
